title: Synthesis of [Mim][OTf]-TiO2 catalyst - NCN project OPUS, grant no. 2020/37/B/ST8/00693.
author: Latos, Piotr
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Dataset contains results obtained during the NCN project OPUS, grant no. 2020/37/B/ST8/00693. The file presents the synthetic procedure of [Mim][OTf]-TiO2 catalyst.
